title: Workbench: A TUI for parallel coding agents
abstract: Workbench: A TUI for parallel coding agents is an AI agent framework that autonomously plans tasks, calls tools, and executes multi-step workflows. Set the goal, and it handles the execution. Boost...
abstract_zh: Workbench：平行编码小分队的私人助理，自动规划任务、调用工具、执行多步流程。你只管设定目标，剩下的交给它处理吧！就像给你的代码团队配备了超级管家，它们会自己做饭打扫，还能写代码哦～ Boost...让Workbench给你带来满满的生产力解放！
